import_boundary_rules.name: simulation_stays_adapter_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Simulation orchestration must not depend on UI or persistence adapters.

import_boundary_rules.name: persistence_stays_ui_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Persistence and migration code must not import UI rendering/input code.

import_boundary_rules.name: core_ui_stays_adapter_light
import_boundary_rules.description: Core UI helpers, renderers, presenters, and view models must not own simulation or persistence.

import_boundary_rules.name: reports_stays_ui_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Report generation is domain/application output data, not a UI renderer.

import_boundary_rules.name: root_domain_stays_ui_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Root domain modules must not depend on UI adapters; fantasy_simulator/main.py is the CLI composition root.

import_boundary_rules.name: world_change_is_headless_domain
import_boundary_rules.description: World-change code must remain deterministic and free of renderer/storage adapters.

import_boundary_rules.name: observation_is_headless_projection
import_boundary_rules.description: Observation projections must not import renderers, persistence, or mutating runtime adapters.

import_boundary_rules.name: world_change_reducers_are_deterministic
import_boundary_rules.description: Reducers and specifications must receive time/randomness as inputs.

import_boundary_rules.name: legacy_world_data_imports_are_scoped
import_boundary_rules.description: Legacy content projections stay in compatibility modules while new code uses setting bundles.

call_boundary_rules.name: headless_domain_has_no_direct_io
call_boundary_rules.description: Headless domain/projection code returns data instead of printing, prompting, or opening files.

call_boundary_rules.name: production_code_uses_canonical_world_change_api
call_boundary_rules.description: Legacy world mutation helpers must not become new production write paths.

acyclic_package_rules.name: world_change_package_is_acyclic
acyclic_package_rules.description: World-change domain modules should not form import cycles.

acyclic_package_rules.name: observation_package_is_acyclic
acyclic_package_rules.description: Observation projection modules should not form import cycles.

overrides.reason: Legacy aggregate kept for save/load and public constructor compatibility.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/character.py::Character fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Dense linguistic feature table builder; candidate for data-table extraction.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/language/phonology.py::default_feature_sets fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Lifecycle resolver keeps death-staging compatibility until policy extraction.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/events_lifecycle.py::check_dying_resolution fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Compatibility report composer with several public sections; keep stable while projections migrate.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/reports.py::generate_monthly_report fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Historical save migration handles several legacy payload shapes in one migration step.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/persistence/migration_steps.py::migrate_v2_to_v3 fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Adventure advancement remains an orchestration adapter around multiple domain outcomes.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/simulation/adventure_coordinator.py::AdventureMixin._advance_adventures fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Legacy mixin owns multiple pause reason adapters until notification policy is split further.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/simulation/engine_pause.py::EnginePauseMixin fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Geometry clustering algorithm with nested spatial checks; preserve behavior before extraction.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/terrain_atlas_landmass.py::_cluster_atlas_sites fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Atlas route drawing mixes visibility, blocking, and shape selection until route view models split.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/atlas_routes.py::_draw_routes fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Atlas label placement has collision and fallback branches that need visual regression coverage.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/atlas_labels.py::_place_labels fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Legacy atlas mask clustering; candidate for shared geometry helper extraction.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/atlas_masks.py::_cluster_sites fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Legacy mask generation composes several terrain fallbacks for save/display compatibility.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/atlas_masks.py::_build_legacy_masks fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Terrain painting loop mixes adjacency and terrain-kind fallbacks; keep budget fixed until split.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/atlas_masks.py::_paint_terrain fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Route overlay builder has shape and visibility branches; split after map snapshot coverage.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/map_region_grid.py::build_region_route_layer fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World overview renderer still mixes layout and section fallback logic.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/map_world_overview.py::render_world_overview fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World memory facade is still a broad dynamic-world compatibility surface during module split.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world_memory_api.py::WorldMemoryMixin fits the default class-line budget or is split behind narrower compatibility adapters.

overrides.reason: Setting bundle schema dataclass exposes authored world sections as public fields.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/content/setting_bundle_schema_world.py::WorldDefinition fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Language evolution planner keeps several rule helpers together for deterministic naming.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/language/evolution.py::LanguageEvolutionPlanner fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Language name generator owns multiple deterministic generation strategies.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/language/naming.py::LanguageNameGenerator fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Timeline mixin remains a compatibility adapter for month/year advancement and annual retention behavior.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/simulation/timeline.py::TimelineMixin fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Render backend protocol intentionally lists the CLI rendering surface.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/render_backend.py::RenderBackend fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Print backend mirrors the render protocol for no-Rich environments.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/render_backend.py::PrintRenderBackend fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Rich backend mirrors the render protocol while adapting optional Rich features.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/ui/render_backend.py::RichRenderBackend fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World actor facade remains a compatibility surface during world module split.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world_actor_api.py::WorldActorMixin fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World calendar facade exposes current calendar transition API.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world_calendar_api.py::WorldCalendarMixin fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: Propagation applies several authored effects in one compatibility entrypoint.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world_state_propagation.py::propagate_state_changes fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World remains the public compatibility aggregate while runtime APIs are split into mixins.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world.py::World fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World composition root imports split mixins and facades for the public aggregate.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world.py fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.

overrides.reason: World structure facade is still a broad compatibility surface.
overrides.removal_condition: Remove when fantasy_simulator/world_structure_api.py::WorldStructureMixin fits the default complexity budgets or is split behind a narrower compatibility adapter.
